## What problem does this solve?

<!-- Describe the friction or gap you ran into. Be specific: what were you trying to do, and what got in the way? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe the change you have in mind. If you have an idea for the implementation, include it — but focus on the "what", not the "how". -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches did you consider? Why is this one better? -->

## Affected components

<!-- Which part of the OS would this change? Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] `bin/os3` CLI
- [ ] `server/` dispatcher
- [ ] `.claude/` agents or hooks
- [ ] `devos/` doctrine / prompts
- [ ] `scripts/` tooling
- [ ] `docs/` / README
- [ ] Other: ___
